content:
MODULE: cosmos.integration.external.youtube
FILE: cosmos/integration/external/youtube.py (408 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: cosmos YouTube Intelligence - Video Insight Extraction.

"I can tell you exactly what that 10-hour lecture said in 30 seconds."

This module handles YouTube transcripts and video metadata extraction.
Uses youtube-transcript-api for transcript fetching (no API key required).

CLASSES:
- TranscriptSegment: A segment of video transcript.
- VideoTranscript: Full video transcript with metadata.
  Methods: def full_text(self) -> str
  Methods: def duration_seconds(self) -> float
  Methods: def get_text_at_time(self, seconds: float, window: float=30) -> str
- VideoMetadata: Video metadata from various sources.
- YouTubeSkill: YouTube video intelligence skill.

Capabilities:
- Fetch transcripts (auto-gener
  Methods: def extract_id(self, url: str) -> Optional[str]
  Methods: async def get_transcript(self, video_id_or_url: str, languages: List[str]=None, include_auto_generat
  Methods: async def get_transcript_text(self, video_id_or_url: str) -> str
  Methods: async def summarize_video(self, video_id_or_url: str, max_length: int=500) -> Dict[str, Any]
  Methods: async def search_videos(self, query: str, limit: int=5) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
  Methods: async def get_chapters(self, video_id_or_url: str) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
  Methods: def clear_cache(self)
  Methods: def get_cache_stats(self) -> Dict[str, Any]
